fault_hypothesis: On line 64, when the counter exceeds the cap, it is set to `cap - 1` instead of `cap`, causing the counter to oscillate between cap-1 and cap on successive calls rather than staying fixed at cap.

constraints.intent: After clamping, the counter must equal cap exactly, not cap-1.
At the end of the clamping branch, the counter value must equal cap.

spec.expr: cap is None or counters__1[key__1] <= cap

constraints.intent: Before the counter value is used in the return/log, it must not exceed cap.
The returned counter value must never exceed the cap.
